calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-05-2012 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-31-2012 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jason Louie for Katia Bonilla (Petitioner).

Mr. Louie stated that he could not get a waiver of bond and that he was seeking limited powers. The Court granted the petition appointing Katia Bonilla as the Administrator of the Estate of Esperanza Antonia Mejia with limited powers with a bond set at $20,000.00 (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-30-2010 Continued To Apr-13-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
